arabic: لَا أُقْسِمُ بِيَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ ﴿١﴾ وَلَا أُقْسِمُ بِالنَّفْسِ اللَّوَّامَةِ ﴿٢﴾
translation: I swear by the Day of Resurrection, and I swear by the self-reproaching soul...
transliteration: La uqsimu bi-yawmil-qiyamah. Wa la uqsimu bin-nafsil-lawwamah.

tafsir.text: Allah swears by the Day of Judgment to emphasize its absolute reality and certainty.

connectionToQiyamah: Direct oath swearing by the day of universal resurrection.

arabic: إِذَا زُلْزِلَتِ الْأَرْضُ زِلْزَالَهَا ﴿١﴾ وَأَخْرَجَتِ الْأَرْضُ أَثْقَالَهَا ﴿٢﴾
translation: When the earth is shaken with its ultimate convulsion, and the earth discharges its burdens...
transliteration: Idha zulzilatil-ardu zilzalaha. Wa akhrajatil-ardu athqalaha.

tafsir.text: The cataclysmic final earthquake of Qiyamah wherein the earth expels all buried bodies and treasures.

connectionToQiyamah: Describes the physical cataclysm at the opening of Resurrection.

arabic: الْقَارِعَةُ ﴿١﴾ مَا الْقَارِعَةُ ﴿٢﴾ وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ مَا الْقَARِعَةُ ﴿٣﴾ يَوْمَ يَكُونُ النَّاسُ كَالْفَرَاشِ الْمَبْثُوثِ ﴿٤﴾
translation: The Striking Hour! What is the Striking Hour? And what will make you realize what the Striking Hour is? A Day when mankind will be like moths scattered about...
transliteration: Al-Qariah. Mal-qariah. Wa ma adraka mal-qariah. Yawma yakunun-nasu kal-farashil-mabthuth.

tafsir.text: Al-Qariah is one of the names of Qiyamah because it strikes the hearts of humanity with terror.

connectionToQiyamah: Depicts human bewilderment and chaos on the Day of Resurrection.

arabic: إِذَا الشَّمْسُ كُوِّرَتْ ﴿١﴾ وَإِذَا النُّجُومُ انكَدَرَتْ ﴿٢﴾ وَإِذَا الْجِبَالُ سُيِّرَتْ ﴿٣﴾
translation: When the sun is wrapped up [in darkness], when the stars fall dispersing, and when the mountains are removed...
transliteration: Idhash-shamsu kuwwirat. Wa idhan-nujumunkadarat. Wa idhal-jibalu suyyirat.

tafsir.text: Describes the dismantling of the solar and cosmic system on Qiyamah.

arabic: إِذَا السَّمَاءُ انفَطَرَتْ ﴿١﴾ وَإِذَا الْكَوَاكِبُ انتَثَرَتْ ﴿٢﴾ وَإِذَا الْبِحَارُ فُجِّرَتْ ﴿٣﴾
translation: When the sky breaks apart, when the planets fall scattering, and when the seas are erupted...
transliteration: Idhas-sama'unfatarat. Wa idhal-kawakibuntatharat. Wa idhal-biharu fujjirat.

tafsir.text: The atmosphere splits open and oceans overflow when cosmic gravity collapses.

connectionToQiyamah: Physical destruction of heavens and earth.

arabic: إِذَا السَّمَاءُ انشَقَّتْ ﴿١﴾ وَأَذِنَتْ لِرَبِّهَا وَحُقَّتْ ﴿٢﴾ وَإِذَا الْأَرْضُ مُدَّتْ ﴿٣﴾
translation: When the sky has split open and listened to its Lord as it must, and when the earth has been extended...
transliteration: Idhas-sama'unshaqqat. Wa adhinat li-Rabbiha wa huqqat. Wa idhal-ardu muddat.

tafsir.text: The earth is flattened and stretched out like leather to accommodate all resurrected creation.

connectionToQiyamah: Preparation of the Earth for the Great Gathering (Al-Mahshar).

arabic: الْحَاقَّۃُ ﴿١﴾ مَا الْحَاقَّۃُ ﴿٢﴾ وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ مَا الْحَاقَّۃُ ﴿٣﴾
translation: The Inevitable Reality! What is the Inevitable Reality? And what will make you realize what the Inevitable Reality is?
transliteration: Al-Haqqah. Mal-haqqah. Wa ma adraka mal-haqqah.

tafsir.text: Named Al-Haqqah because on this day all promises, rewards, and punishments become absolute reality.

connectionToQiyamah: Refers to the inescapable truth of divine Judgement.

arabic: سَأَلَ سَائِلٌ بِعَذَابٍ وَاقِعٍ ﴿١﴾ لِّلْكَافِرِينَ لَيْسَ لَهُ دَافِعٌ ﴿٢﴾
translation: A questioner asked concerning a punishment bound to occur—for the disbelievers, which none can avert...
transliteration: Sa'ala sa'ilun bi-'adhabin waqi'. Lil-kafirina laysa lahu dafi'.

tafsir.text: Refers to Al-Nadr ibn al-Harith who mockingly asked for punishment, which is guaranteed on Qiyamah.

arabic: فَارْتَقِبْ يَوْمَ تَأْتِي السَّمَاءُ بِدُخَانٍ مُّبِينٍ ﴿١٠﴾ يَغْشَى النَّاسَ هَٰذَا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ ﴿١١﴾
translation: Then watch for the Day when the sky will bring a visible smoke, covering the people; this is a painful torment...
transliteration: Fartaqib yawma ta'tis-sama'u bi-dukhanim-mubin. Yaghshan-nasa hadha 'adhabun alim.

tafsir.text: Describes Major Sign #05 (The Smoke) which will engulf humanity prior to Qiyamah.

connectionToQiyamah: Direct reference to one of the 10 Major Signs.

arabic: وَإِذَا وَقَعَ الْقَوْلُ عَلَيْهِمْ أَخْرَجْنَا لَهُمْ دَابَّةً مِّنَ الْأَرْضِ تُكَلِّمُهُمْ أَنَّ النَّاسَ كَانُوا بِآيَاتِنَا لَا يُوقِنُونَ
translation: And when the word falls upon them, We will bring forth for them a creature from the earth speaking to them, that mankind were not of Our verses certain.
transliteration: Wa idha waqa'al-qawlu 'alayhim akhrajna lahum dabbatam-minal-ardi tukallimuhum...

tafsir.text: Direct Qur'anic confirmation of Major Sign #06 (The Beast of the Earth).

connectionToQiyamah: Emergence of the Beast as a major end-times sign.
